sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93489" key="saw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σαώ-της</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">σαόω</etym>) poet. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σωτήρ</foreign>, epith. of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.603</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:2:37:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.37.2</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
